scripts.start:shell: cd projects/shell && ng serve shell --port 4200 --serve-path http://localhost:4200/ --configuration=development
scripts.start:portfolio: cd projects/portfolio && ng serve portfolio --port 4201 --serve-path http://localhost:4201/ --configuration=development
scripts.start:products: cd projects/products && ng serve products --port 4202 --serve-path http://localhost:4202/ --configuration=development
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:shell" "npm run start:portfolio" "npm run start:products"
